prompt: Build a school management database where students enroll in courses.

business_rules: Grades cannot be modified after semester close.
constraints: Max assignment file upload size is 10MB.
confidence_explanation: Lack of clearly defined business operational rules.

actors.name: Admin
actors.description: System administrator overseeing database metrics and accounts.
actors.why_needed: Required to manage application entities, records, and access permissions.

permissions.description: Allows user to view their registered attributes.
Allows user to view their registered attributes.

actors.name: Admin
actors.description: System administrator overseeing database metrics and accounts.

entities.name: Enrollment
entities.description: Logical mapping linking students to enrolled courses.

relationships.description: Links Course to its parent Teacher record.
Links Enrollment to its parent Course record.
Links Enrollment to its parent Student record.

business_rules.rule: Students must be active to enroll in courses.
business_rules.description: Students must be active to enroll in courses.

design_decisions.decision: Enrollment acts as join table between Student and Course.
design_decisions.reason: Supports many-to-many relationship mapping and tracks grades.

nodes.description: System administrator overseeing database metrics and accounts.
Logical mapping linking students to enrolled courses.

warnings.message: Orphan Entity node 'SubmitAssignment' has no relations or workflow triggers connected in system design graph.
warnings.repair_hint: Map relationships or bind this entity as a workflow dependency.
